items.title: Google's "Frozen v2" chip reportedly bakes Gemini's architecture directly into silicon for efficiency gains
items.summary: Google is developing "Frozen v2," a server chip that bakes the Gemini architecture directly into hardware. According to internal sources, it could be 6 to 10 times more efficient than current TPUs.
